prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别约为7672→8720→8477→9473→9599，整体呈后移趋势，近3年累计后移约1122名；2025年基准位次约9599名；该 校在福建省物理类招生计划2021年96人→2022年97人→2023年101人→2024年99人→2025年106人→2026年99人，较2025年缩招7人（-6.6%），招生名额减少理论上使竞争略有加 剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年升至第42名（2021年45→2025年44→2026年42），排名稳步上升，学校综合实力持续增强；2022年曾因校园安全事件出现偏负面舆情，但近年已无显著负面信号；抖音热度排名第34位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，整体报考关注度平稳；化学工程与技术A+（全国顶尖）、化学A-、控制科学与工程A-，化工领域实力突出；但化工类属'生化环材'大类，社会舆论持续劝退，可能对相关专业报考热度产生一定抑制。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业社会热度持续高位，华东理工大学在上述领域均有招生但名额有限；福建省物理类考生数从2021年11.7 万持续增长至2025年19.2万，2026年估算约20.4万（较2025年增约6%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争，稳中有升，反映整体竞争水平提高。 华东理工大学位于上海，属一线城市高校，对福建省考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在福建省物理类招生人数占比较小（约99人），属跨省招生，无本省倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年缩招7人、福建省物理类考生持续增长约6%、学校软科排名上升、化工类优势学科受舆论劝退影响等因素，考虑考 生规模扩大和学校层次提升带来的竞争加剧，预测2026年物理类最低位次约9269名，区间8769–9769名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 7672 → 8720 → 8477 → 9473 → 9599, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1122 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 9599; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province was 96 in 2021 → 97 in 2022 → 101 in 2023 → 99 in 2024 → 106 in 2025 → 99 in 2026, a reduction of 7 students (-6.6%) compared to 2025, theoretically intensifying competition due to fewer slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings rose to 42nd in 2026 (45th in 2021 → 44th in 2025 → 42nd in 2026), showing steady improvement and continuously enhanced comprehensive strength; in 2022, there was a negative campus safety incident, but no significant negative signals in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking 34th (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, overall stable application attention; Chemical Engineering and Technology A+ (top nationally), Chemistry A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, with outstanding strength in chemical engineering; however, chemical engineering belongs to the 'Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials' category, which has persistent negative public opinion, potentially suppressing application enthusiasm for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly sought after; East China University of Science and Technology offers these majors but with limited slots; the number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province has grown from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, estimated at about 204,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 6% from 2025), expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition, reflecting a steady rise in overall competition level. Located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, the university has some regional appeal to Fujian examinees; its enrollment in Fujian Province for Physics Category is relatively small (about 99 students), as it is an inter-provincial enrollment with no local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the reduction of 7 students in 2026, the continuous growth of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province by about 6%, the rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, and the negative public opinion discouraging chemical engineering majors, along with intensified competition due to the expanding candidate pool and improved university level, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 9269, with a range of 8769–9769.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1920 → 1854 → 1869 → 2348 → 2338. From 2021 to 2023, they stabilized in the 1850–1920 range, shifted significantly backward to 2348 in 2024, and remained roughly flat at 2338 in 2025. Over the past two years, the cumulative backward shift is about 469 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 2338 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 6 students each year from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 5 in 2025, and then sharply increased to 12 in 2026, an increase of 7 students (+140%) compared to 2025. The significant increase in enrollment slots theoretically eases competition considerably.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it rose to 42nd place, with a steadily improving ranking and continuously strengthening overall strength. In 2022, there was some negative public opinion due to a campus safety incident, but there have been no significant negative signals in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranks 34th (relatively hot), with overall application attention stable. Chemical Engineering and Technology is A+ (top nationally), Chemistry is A-, and Control Science and Engineering is A-, all STEM disciplines with limited direct appeal to History Category candidates. The History Category enrollment majors are mainly Law and Foreign Languages and Literature, which have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has relatively high social popularity (recommended), but the job market is saturated and competition is fierce. Foreign Languages and Literature has average social popularity (wait-and-see). The number of History Category candidates in Fujian Province has been declining from 78,000 in 2021 to 57,000 in 2024, slightly rebounding to 60,000 in 2025, and estimated at about 64,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 6.7% from 2025). The candidate pool has expanded slightly but remains generally stable. East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, which has some regional appeal for History Category candidates from Fujian Province. The History Category enrollment is small (12 students in 2026), making it a cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant 140% expansion in History Category enrollment in 2026, a modest increase of about 6.7% in Fujian's History Category candidates, the rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, and the fact that Law is relatively popular but competitive, the expansion rate far exceeds the candidate growth rate, leading to a significant easing of competition. However, the improvement in university level and the popularity of Law exert upward pressure on rankings. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 4272, with a range of 3772–4772.

History Category enrollment majors are only Law and Foreign Languages and Literature, offering limited choices. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 3772) can aim for Law as a reach. Candidates with rankings at or above the middle of the range are advised to target Law as the primary goal and use Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety option.
